ai.query_audit_query: Compare our recent bills against their original purchase orders and flag any price differences.
ai.query_receipts_query: Enter all uploaded expenses, matching each to the appropriate vendor. Create vendors for any that don't yet exist.
ai.query_restock_query: Which items are running low based on the last 30 days of sales? Draft purchase orders for each.
ai.query_summary_query: Give me a summary of this month's revenue, top-selling items, and outstanding receivables.
ai.scenario_batch_bills_reply:
✅ Created 5 Draft Bills:
  • Supplier Co – $842.00 (12 items matched)
  • Quick Parts – $215.50 (3 items matched)
  • Office Depot – $67.80 (4 items matched)
  • FedEx Freight – $320.00
  • Utility Inc – $189.40
⚠ 1 tax mismatch flagged on Bill #3 — review before approving.
ai.scenario_batch_bills_thinking: Reading receipts… matching SKUs… checking tax…
ai.scenario_bulk_catalog_reply:
🛍 Imported 150 items:
  • 48 → Electronics (mapped from 'Elec/Gadgets')
  • 52 → Hardware (mapped from 'Tools & Fasteners')
  • 31 → Office Supplies
  • 19 → Consumables
All selling prices set at cost × 1.40. 4 duplicate SKUs skipped.
View in Inventory ↗
ai.scenario_bulk_catalog_thinking: Reading 150 rows… mapping categories… calculating prices…
ai.scenario_bulk_catalog_user: 📎 [Drops supplier_catalog.xlsx] — map to our categories and set 40% markup.
ai.scenario_discrepancy_audit_reply:
🔍 Audit complete — 20 bills vs 20 POs:
  ✓ 17 bills matched perfectly
  ⚠ 3 discrepancies found:
    • Bill #1042: Widget A billed $12.50 vs PO $11.00 (+$1.50/unit × 80 = $120 over)
    • Bill #1038: Freight charged $85 — not in original PO
    • Bill #1051: Component X qty 120 vs PO qty 100 (+20 units)
Want me to draft dispute notes for each?
ai.scenario_discrepancy_audit_thinking: Matching bills to POs… comparing line prices…
ai.scenario_discrepancy_audit_user: Compare our last 20 bills against their original POs and flag any price changes.
ai.scenario_smart_restock_reply:
📦 Drafted 3 Purchase Orders:
  • PO-041 → Alpha Supplies: 200× Widget A, 50× Widget C ($1,840)
  • PO-042 → BetaCorp: 100× Component X ($950)
  • PO-043 → Gamma Co: 75× Part Y ($412)
All items will last ≥30 days at current velocity. Ready to send?
ai.scenario_smart_restock_thinking: Analysing stock levels and sales velocity…
ai.scenario_smart_restock_user: Draft POs for anything running low based on 30-day velocity.
ai.showcase_subtitle: Celerp AI eliminates manual data entry - processing receipts, drafting purchase orders, and auditing your books automatically.

th.name: Name
cloud.hero_desc1: Celerp runs on your machine and your data stays there. Web Access gives you a secure URL (like yourname.celerp.com) so you and your staff can reach it from any browser - at the office, at home, or on the go.
cloud.hero_desc2: Your data never leaves your machine. We just relay the connection.
cloud.feature_url_desc: Get a permanent address like yourname.celerp.com. Share it with your staff - they just open a browser and log in. No VPN, no port forwarding, no IT setup.
cloud.feature_backup_desc: Your database is automatically backed up and encrypted with a key only you hold. If your machine dies, pull your backup and keep going.
cloud.feature_connector_desc: Connect Shopify, WooCommerce, QuickBooks, Xero, Lazada, and Shopee. We handle the OAuth - no API keys to manage.
cloud.feature_ai_desc: Ask questions about your business in plain English. Inventory analysis, AR summaries, auto-draft purchase orders, invoice reconciliation.
cloud.plan_ai_desc: Everything in Cloud plus the AI assistant.
cloud.backup_desc: Encrypted backups with AES-256-GCM. Daily DB + weekly file backups, auto-pruned. Your key - we can't read it.
settings.password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters
